name: ignore-leading-blanks
description: ignore leading blanks when finding sort keys in each line

name: dictionary-order
description: consider only blanks and alphanumeric characters

name: ignore-case
description: fold lower case to upper case characters

name: general-numeric-sort
description: compare according to general numerical value

name: ignore-nonprinting
description: consider only printable characters

name: month-sort
description: compare (unknown) < 'JAN' < ... < 'DEC'

name: human-numeric-sort
description: compare human readable numbers (e.g., 2K 1G)

name: numeric-sort
description: compare according to string numerical value; see full documentation for supported strings

name: random-sort
description: shuffle, but group identical keys. See also shuf(1) --random-source=FILE get random bytes from FILE

name: reverse
description: reverse the result of comparisons --sort=WORD sort according to WORD: general-numeric -g, human-numeric -h, month -M, numeric -n, random -R, version -V

name: version-sort
description: natural sort of (version) numbers within text

name: batch-size
description: merge at most NMERGE inputs at once; for more use temp files

name: check
description: check for sorted input; do not sort

name: check-2
description: like -c, but do not report first bad line --compress-program=PROG compress temporaries with PROG; decompress them with PROG -d --debug annotate the part of the line used to sort, and warn about questionable usage to standard error --files0-from=F read input from the files specified by NUL-terminated names in file F; If F is -, read names from standard input

name: key
description: sort via a key; KEYDEF gives location and type

name: merge
description: merge already sorted files; do not sort

name: output
description: write result to FILE instead of standard output

name: stable
description: stabilize sort by disabling last-resort comparison

name: buffer-size
description: use SIZE for main memory buffer

name: field-separator
description: use SEP instead of non-blank to blank transition

name: temporary-directory
description: use DIR for temporaries, not $TMPDIR or /tmp; multiple options specify multiple directories --parallel=N change the number of sorts run concurrently to N

name: unique
description: output only the first of lines with equal keys; with -c, check for strict ordering

name: zero-terminated
description: line delimiter is NUL, not newline --help display this help and exit --version output version information and exit
